title: Kilrock Damp Clear Moisture Trap - 2X 500g Sachets - Long Lasting up to 12 Weeks - Helps to Prevent Mould & Mildew Build-up in Caravans, Garages, Boats, Kitchen, Bathroom, Wardrobes and Cupboards
features: LONG LASTING - Each individual sachet is designed to provide long-lasting moisture absorption, with a single sachet capable of delivering up to 12 weeks of continuous freshness and effectiveness.
FOR ALL ROOM TYPES - Suitable for all room types including caravans, garages, boats, kitchens, bathrooms, wardrobes, cupboards, large rooms and small rooms.

CONTAINS 2X 500G SACHETS - The moisture trap comes with two generously sized 500g sachets, providing you with a total of 1kg of moisture-absorbing power for enhanced efficiency and long-lasting protection.
REMOVES MUSTY ODOURS - This convenient, no-mess sachet is designed to effectively remove musty odors, leaving your space feeling fresh and revitalized with minimal effort required.

PREVENTS MOULD & MILDEW - This product actively helps to prevent the growth of mould and mildew in damp areas, providing a reliable solution for maintaining a cleaner, healthier environment in moisture-prone spaces.
description: From the manufacturer 2x 500g Sachets Contains 2x500g refill sachets. The hight airflow design and breathable fibre refill sachet protect against: Damp Damage, Poor Air Quality, Smelly Odours, Mould & Mildew 20㎡ Coverage One 500g refill sachet is effective for up to 12 weeks in rooms up to 20㎡. Long Lasting 12 Weeks One 500g refill sachet is effective for up to 12 weeks in rooms up to 20㎡. Variety of Use Perfect for all around the home and in: caravans, boats, garages and anywhere damp is a problem.
